/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_motor.dir/examples/test_motor.c.o -o test_motor  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/kuboaki/Documents/projects/libspikehat_sim/build -Wl,-rpath,/Users/kuboaki/.pyenv/versions/3.12.3/lib/python3.12/site-packages/mujoco libspikehat_sim.dylib /Users/kuboaki/.pyenv/versions/3.12.3/lib/python3.12/site-packages/mujoco/libmujoco.3.8.1.dylib -lpthread -lm
